name: Login with valid credentials returns token
description:
As a QA Engineer
  I want to validate User REST API endpoints
  So that user management SOA service is functioning correctly
descriptionHtml:
As a QA Engineer
I want to validate User REST API endpoints
So that user management SOA service is functioning correctly

And  the response should contain field "token"
